source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for productive operations UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual labels, work queues, and efficient numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px grids, hex comb modules, compact queue panels, amber status bands, and dense operations surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Honeybee motif
prompts.prompt: Create a high-resolution isolated Morphous motif source: a realistic honeybee on a small honeycomb fragment, complete full subject visible, accurate honeybee anatomy, fuzzy black-and-cream thorax, natural honey-amber abdomen stripes, fine antennae, six legs with pollen-gold detail, translucent veined wings with pale cream/grey sheen, and clean amber wax comb cells. Center the single bee and comb fragment with generous padding and crisp silhouette edges. Place it on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparent removal; the background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, lighting falloff, reflections, or edge glow. Exclude butterflies, dragonflies, wasps, hornets, grapes, strawberries, parrots, maple leaves, wildflower field backgrounds, hive frames, swarms, second bees, text, and watermarks.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Honeybee" / "Honeybee on Comb", source reference for a productive operations shadcn/tweakcn theme. Derive the system from a realistic honeybee-on-comb motif: honey amber stripes, pollen gold detail, bee black and wax cream contrast, translucent wing grey, comb brown cells, and wildflower green support states. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Use 8px radius, comb-cell grid rhythm, amber actions, gold focus rings, cream surfaces, black readable text, and compact operations dashboard hierarchy. Exclude butterflies, dragonflies, wasps, hornets, grapes, strawberries, parrots, maple leaves, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple gradients, stock UI kit styling, random brands, and misspellings.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Honeybee" / "Honeybee on Comb", translated from the light board and the same honeybee-on-comb motif. Keep honey amber and pollen gold primary accents, bee black and comb-brown dark surfaces, wax-cream readable text, wing-grey muted panels, field green support states, subtle comb-cell texture, 8px radius, and productive operations dashboard tone. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Exclude butterflies, dragonflies, wasps, hornets, grapes, strawberries, parrots, maple leaves, neon colors, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple gradients, pure black-only backgrounds, illegible text, random brands, and misspellings.
